content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Jeanne, Alice, Judy C., Susan, Lynn

Date: Feb. 16, 1984
File No. M-84-031

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: Telephone Advice

On February 16, 1984, I gave the following advice to Assemblyman Felando on reporting in the following situation:

Felando held a fundraiser which included a fishing tournament, dinner, speeches, etc. The boats, dinners, etc., were all contributed. He invited several legislators to attend.

The boats, dinners, etc., are in-kind contributions to Felando. The legislators who attended at no cost at Felando's invitation do not have to report gifts on their SEIs.

BAM:plh
